codeReview.summary: The fix directly resolves the prior blocking defect: edit-sheet bindings now read/write mutable @State, and edit form state is initialized from the selected profile before presentation. This removes the immutable snapshot getter/setter mismatch that previously caused typed edits to be overwritten and not persisted.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The switcher-ui-worker procedure requires broad app validation and manual UI sanity checks, but the fix transcript/handoff only evidences scoped xcodebuild runs while still reporting followedProcedure=true.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/switcher-ui-worker/SKILL.md (steps 6-7 require scripts/test-openburnbar-app.sh and manual checks); handoff for session 0e281f3d-123b-4eb2-bac1-887481e7f441 lists only scoped xcodebuild tests and interactiveChecks is empty.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Test naming may be misleading for workers: SwitcherSettingsUITests are explicitly store-level tests, not UI-interaction/binding tests, which can cause overconfidence when validating UI binding regressions.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: AgentLensTests/Active/SwitcherSettingsUITests.swift line 9: "Tests all VAL-SETTINGS-* assertions that can be verified through store-level testing."

summary: Reviewed fix feature core-engine-fix-settings-edit-bindings against the prior failure in settings-account-switcher-management-ui by examining mission metadata, fix transcript skeleton, prior review, both handoffs, and both diffs (45d186134278c9a630ed245b65c3ba168cc83a3d and c15782f71371dc6c39b9540cd2240c4e6ec7183e). Result: PASS — the exact binding defect identified in the prior review is corrected and the edit path now uses mutable state consistently for persisted saves.
